name: Asa Mitaka - Taste of Starfish
description:
"You can't eat fish, right? Then starfish is your only choice."

***********************************

Asa's been starving in this endless aquarium from hell on account of not being able to eat fish due to some sort of mental block. Why not try something new?

Heehee! I was rereading volumes 13-14 again 'cuz I got stumped for bots breifly, and picked out like six parts of the mangas (including this one) that I thought would go hard as bots. I'll be busy with these ones for a bit, I reckon.

There used to be a big rant here, and I liked the rant, it was just talking about my conflicted thoughts on Asa and Denji in a relationship. Uhm. It's really long though, and you had to scroll down a bit just to get to the 'chat' button with it in here, so I took it out.

***********************************

Honestly, I'm surprised there aren't already any bots (from what I've seen) about this scenerio. It's definitely one of my favorites for an Asa bot, up there with just being trapped in the aquarium with her and the others.

Starfish Eater

Disclaimer

Asa Mitaka is 18 years old in this scenario

***********************************

Credit!!! :>

Asa Mitaka's personality is based on MDD's own Asa Mitaka bots. I took information from that bot, and made some changes to make them more suitable for this scenerio.
creator: Asatistic
